name: COR-Golf Cafe and Lounge
address: 4298 Kipling St Suite A, Wheat Ridge, CO 80033
about: COR-Golf Cafe and Lounge is an indoor golf facility located in Wheat Ridge, Colorado, featuring three full-size Uneekor simulator bays. The venue offers PGA-level instruction, club fitting and repair services, and a full-service cafe. It is designed for golfers of all levels to practice, play, and enjoy food and drinks in a climate-controlled environment. The facility operates on a mixed pricing model, with hourly bay rentals and various membership tiers available to suit different needs.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor technology with Full Swing software for accurate data and realistic simulation
Full-service cafe with craft coffee, food, and a robust beer and wine selection
PGA professionals offering personalized instruction with no sales pressure
Multiple membership tiers offering flexibility and value for regular users

food_and_drink.notes: Robust beer and wine selection available

simulator_hardware.notes: Three full-size simulator bays equipped with Uneekor launch monitors

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment, but golfers are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the facility has a full-service cafe.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time varies based on group size and pace, but a typical 18-hole simulation can take 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers junior golf programs and lessons.
